## Discussion

This property measures only the agent’s speed in the direction it faces. The concrete subclasses of [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent] relate speed to orientation and position; see the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent2D/velocity] ([doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent2D]) or [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent3D/velocity] ([doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent3D]) property for the appropriate subclass.

# speed

**Instance Property**

The agent’s current forward speed, in units per second.

## Declaration

```swift
var speed: Float { get set }
```

## Discussion

This property measures only the agent’s speed in the direction it faces. The concrete subclasses of [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent] relate speed to orientation and position; see the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent2D/velocity] ([doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent2D]) or [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent3D/velocity] ([doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent3D]) property for the appropriate subclass.
title: speed
